title: Where did humans come from?
description: Test your knowledge of early hominids and paleolithic migration
topic_path: The origin of humans and early human societies

assessment_items.question_content:
Which evolutionary theory suggests that early hominids adapted more easily to dry climates?

[[☃ radio 1]]

Which early hominid species was one of the first to control fire and migrate to new regions?


[[☃ radio 1]]

What is one feature that distinguishes Homo sapiens from its predecessors?


[[☃ radio 1]]

Archaeologists have confirmed that the birthplace of humankind was in

[[☃ radio 2]]

Homo sapiens first appeared approximately

[[☃ radio 1]]

What is the most widely accepted theory about human migration to the Americas?

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They traveled by sea, from East Asia
They traveled by land, crossing the Bering land bridge
They traveled by sea, from West Africa

assessment_items.question_content:
What is one piece of evidence that supports the theory that humans crossed to the Americas via the Bering land bridge?

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Spear points similar to those found near Beringia were found in New Mexico
Ruins of former settlements were unearthed near Beringia
Human fossils in the Americas were carbon-dated prior to 13,000 years ago
